message:
feat(cli): robot atc subcommand queries live ATC operator via HTTP

robot.rs: Add structured types (AtcRobotSnapshot, AtcRobotAgent,
AtcRobotAction, AtcSummaryData, AtcLivenessData, AtcDecisionData,
AtcConflictData, AtcData) for deserializing and re-serializing ATC
operator state from the live server's ws-state endpoint.

New infrastructure: atc_live_bearer_token_from_reader resolves auth
tokens from AGENT_MAIL_TOKEN, HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN env vars, or config.
atc_ws_state_url_from_agent_mail_url constructs the ws-state polling
URL from the configured AGENT_MAIL_URL, preserving token query params.
AtcLiveEndpoint encapsulates URL + optional bearer token.

The `am robot atc` subcommand now prefers the live HTTP endpoint over
static DB queries, providing real-time ATC summary, liveness, decision,
and conflict data with proper --format json/text rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
